rule: only APPLICABLE_EVALUATED rows enter primary denominator
primary pass count is computed only over applicable rows
primary failure count is computed only over applicable rows
invalid transformations are rejected before denominator accounting
unsupported fragments remain outside primary pass/fail accounting
all counted rows must have PASS in this artifact run
rejected/unsupported rows cannot masquerade as PASS
rejections.csv and obligations rejected rows agree by candidate id
counted adapter set must match the hash-gated execution manifest
error/timeout rows cannot enter primary denominator
coverage pass totals match primary pass count
baseline/seeded controls cannot share primary row ids
subject exclusions cannot appear in primary obligation rows
OPA is either hash-gated into the denominator or excluded before results
